title: Micro Inscription Studies
description: Four independent studies of readable micro inscriptions on tiny luxury surfaces: a rice grain, locket rim, watch gear, and stamp perforation.
creative_direction: This package explores unrelated micro-text settings where text must be tiny, precisely located, physically engraved or printed, and emotionally legible without depending on a shared reference image.

en.title: Micro Inscription Studies
en.description: Four independent studies of readable micro inscriptions on tiny luxury surfaces: a rice grain, locket rim, watch gear, and stamp perforation.

zh-CN.title: 微刻单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立的微缩刻字研究，覆盖米粒、吊坠边缘、腕表齿轮和邮票齿孔等微型载体。
